## Checklist

- [ ] `swift test` passes locally
- [ ] `xcrun swift-format lint --recursive --strict Sources Tests` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for new behavior (or not applicable)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (for user-visible changes)
- [ ] Golden snapshots: if renderer output changed intentionally, re-recorded **both** SVG and PNG goldens in the same commit and visually inspected them (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
